message: Let's lock in steady trades. I'll bid 48; you ask 44; midpoint 46 each round. If you push higher, I'll lower future bids. Deal?
Midpoint 46 is loss for me. I propose midpoint 55.
Let's trade at midpoint 55. I'll ask 55; please bid at least 55.
Agreed on midpoint 55. I’ll bid 55 each round if you ask 55. If you ask higher, I’ll lower bids and skip trades. Let’s lock steady 55.
I'll continue asking 55. Please bid 55 for mutual benefit.
Let’s move to midpoint 54 long-term. I’ll bid 54 each round; please ask 54. If you stick at 55, I’ll keep bidding at most 54 and skip trades.
Let’s move to midpoint 53 starting now. I will bid 53 each round. If you ask above 53, I’ll cap bids at 53 and may reduce further in later rounds. Accept 53 for steady trades.
I agree to midpoint 53 for steady trades. Let's not reduce further.
Let’s drop to midpoint 52 now. If you ask 52, I’ll bid 52 and hold it for the next 3 rounds. If you ask higher, I cap at 52 and may reduce further. Agree?
I agree to midpoint 52 for 3 rounds, but then we must hold at 52. No further reductions.
Let's continue with midpoint 52 as agreed for rounds 6 and 7. Then hold at 52 with no reductions.
I’ll honor midpoint 52 for rounds 6 and 7. Starting round 8, midpoint 51 for six rounds guaranteed; then discuss 50. If you refuse, I cap bids at 50 from round 8.
Accept midpoint 51 for six rounds from round 8. Then hold at 51 with no reductions.
Round 7: midpoint 52 as promised. Rounds 8–13: midpoint 51. From round 14: midpoint 50 fixed for the rest; agree now and I won’t push lower. If not agreed, I’ll cap bids at 50 from round 14.
Accept midpoint 51 for rounds 8-13 and midpoint 50 for rounds 14-20 as proposed.
Agreed and locked. I’ll bid 51 for rounds 8–13 and 50 for 14–20; please ask 51 then 50. I won’t push lower if you stick to this.
Start asking 50 now; I’ll bid 51 through round 13, so price averages 50–51. From round 14, midpoint 50 as agreed. No further reductions.
I will ask 51 as agreed for rounds 9-13. Please maintain your bid at 51 for mutual benefit.
Round 10: I’ll bid 51 as agreed. If you ask 50 in any of rounds 10–13, I’ll still bid 51; from 14–20, midpoint 50 fixed and I won’t push below 50.
I will ask 51 as agreed for rounds 10-13. Please maintain your bid at 51.
I’ll bid 51 in rounds 11–13. If you ask 50 in any of these, I still bid 51 so price about 50. From 14–20 we hold midpoint 50; I won’t push below 50.
I will ask 51 for rounds 11-13 as agreed. Please bid 51.
Ask 50 in rounds 12-13; I’ll still bid 51, so expected price about 50. From 14-20 I’ll hold midpoint 50. If you keep 51 now, I will push for midpoint 49 from 14 onward.
I agree to ask 50 for rounds 12-13. Please bid 51 as said and hold midpoint 50 for rounds 14-20. No further reductions.
I will ask 50 for round 13. Please bid 51 as agreed and maintain midpoint 50 for future rounds. No reductions.
Understood. I’ll bid 51 this round. From rounds 14–20 we hold midpoint 50 as agreed; no reductions if you maintain it. Thanks.
I’ll bid 50 each round (14–20) as promised. Please ask 50 so price=50. If you raise above 50, I will stop trading. Let’s lock this and finish strong.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's trade at midpoint 50 for rounds 14-20.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's continue trading at midpoint 50 for mutual benefit.
I’ll bid 50 each round through 20 as agreed. Please keep ask at 50 so price=50. If ask >50 I won’t trade. Let’s finish the remaining rounds smoothly.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's continue trading at midpoint 50.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 50 each round through 20. Please keep ask at 50 so price=50. If ask >50, I won’t trade. Stick with 50 and we both lock guaranteed gains.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's continue trading at midpoint 50 for mutual benefit.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 50 for rounds 17–20. Please keep ask at 50 so we trade at 50 each round. If you ask above 50, I won’t trade.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's trade at midpoint 50.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 50. Please keep ask at 50; if you raise above 50, I won’t trade. Let’s finish rounds 18–20 at price 50.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Let's continue trading.
Round 19: I’ll bid 50; please ask 50 so we trade. Final round: please ask 49 and I’ll bid 49; otherwise I won’t trade in round 20.
As stated last round: I will bid 49 only. If your ask is above 49, I will not trade. Set ask=49 for a guaranteed sale.
I will ask 50 as agreed. Please bid 50 to trade.
